CONTENT_DISTILLATION_MANIFESTO.system_objective: Ingest unstructured, raw flat-website data and surgically isolate core brand messaging, media, and optional 3D asset references into 5 structurally locked container buckets. Discard all irrelevant visual noise and layout constraints.

ingestion_governance_rules.aggressive_exclusion: If incoming scraped data does not cleanly fulfill the semantic parameters of the 5 defined buckets, it must be permanently discarded at the ingestion boundary.
ingestion_governance_rules.structural_autonomy: Do not extract inline CSS styles, font families, custom colors, layout coordinates, or button dimensions. Harvest only raw text strings, media URLs, and optional 3D asset references as pure semantic elements.
ingestion_governance_rules.layout_flattening: All dynamic client-side layouts (sliders, auto-playing carousels, tab-switches, interactive accordion blocks) must be unrolled and flattened into static data entries before curation filtering.
ingestion_governance_rules.3d_asset_harvesting: Scan for any embedded 3D content: Sketchfab iframes (extract model UID from src URL), GLTF/GLB file links, OBJ file links, or embedded model viewer scripts. These are OPTIONAL enrichment fields — if absent, the pipeline falls back to default particle fields.

dom_extraction_directives: Target root semantic layers of the initial homepage viewport.
Isolate primary heading nodes (h1, h2), adjacent introduction paragraph containers, and root header branding elements.
Scan for any Sketchfab embeds, 3D model viewers, or WebGL canvas elements in the hero area.

captured_parameters.brand_identity_logo: Clean URL string mapping to a vector graphic or high-contrast wordmark asset.
captured_parameters.hook_headline: The absolute primary promotional statement or core brand greeting text.
captured_parameters.hook_context: The immediate supporting explanatory phrase or secondary sentence establishing operational context.
captured_parameters.primary_action_label: The localized text string of the primary conversion button node.
captured_parameters.hero_3d_asset_url: OPTIONAL. Sketchfab model UID (from iframe src), GLTF/GLB file URL, or OBJ file URL found in the hero area. Empty string if none found.

curation_gates_and_constraints.truncation_protocol: If the extracted hook_headline exceeds the headline_word_limit, programmatically truncate the string at the first logical punctuation break or dependent clause.
curation_gates_and_constraints.3d_asset_preference: Sketchfab UID > GLTF/GLB URL > OBJ URL > empty (triggers particle fallback).

bucket_2_corporate_dna_and_the_collage.target_component: CollageIntroduction (Artistic Overlapping Depth Narrative with GSAP Parallax)
dom_extraction_directives: Scan semantic containers tagged or labeled with 'About', 'Our Mission', 'Who We Are', 'Story', or deep-body corporate summaries.
Collect content imagery from contextual body blocks, strictly skipping UI layout accents or utility vectors.

captured_parameters.intro_statement: A single, high-impact text block containing the ultimate philosophical or identity narrative.
captured_parameters.collage_images: A strict sequential array of image or background cinematic loop URLs representing real work, environments, products, or human interactions.

curation_gates_and_constraints.narrative_density_limit: Isolate exactly one profound sentence explaining the company's purpose. Reject multi-paragraph blocks or dense blocks of biographical text.
curation_gates_and_constraints.decorative_icon_suppression: Any image asset measuring less than the asset_resolution_floor_pixels in width or height must be skipped to eliminate low-end clip-art, UI spacers, or brand social icons from dirtying the spatial collage canvas.

bucket_3_the_symmetric_matrix.target_component: StaticOfferingsGrid (Structured Services or Products with 3D Hover States)
dom_extraction_directives: Locate repeating sibling HTML layout structures, modular feature matrices, product columns, or list configurations containing parallel combinations of headers, descriptions, and thumbnails.

items.item_title: The concise name or header of the specific service or product unit.
items.item_summary: A brief 1-sentence synopsis defining the specific value proposition of that unit.
items.item_cover_url: A direct image or texture link mapped explicitly to display that individual unit.

curation_gates_and_constraints.cardinality_enforcement: The offering_units array must contain a maximum of 4 high-priority items. If the source data contains a larger set, extract only the top 3 or 4 based on DOM hierarchy or text keyword density.

bucket_4_the_deep_trust_philosophy.target_component: TwoColumnValuePause (Asymmetric Split with GSAP Split-Text Reveals and Optional Sketchfab Embed)
dom_extraction_directives: Target validation blocks containing elevated credibility elements, user testimonials, verified reviews, award achievements, case study headers, or executive leadership quotes.
Scan for Sketchfab embeds or 3D model viewers in the about/philosophy/trust sections.

captured_parameters.philosophy_anchor: A singular, commanding quotation or authoritative milestone statement representing premium craftsmanship or execution.
captured_parameters.philosophy_deep_dive: A secondary context paragraph expanding on the anchor statement to build immediate consumer trust.
captured_parameters.singular_master_visual: One exceptionally high-quality photography URL or 3D schematic blueprint asset designed to visually anchor the statement.
captured_parameters.sketchfab_embed_uid: OPTIONAL. Sketchfab model UID extracted from any iframe embed in the trust/philosophy section. Empty string if none found.

curation_gates_and_constraints.visual_silence_isolation: Extract exactly one primary high-trust thought or review. Suppress scrolling testimonial carousels, customer review feeds, or multi-logo walls entirely to enforce a clean layout break.

bucket_5_the_final_gateway.target_component: ClosingCallToAction (Immersive Conversion Terminal with Particle Field)
dom_extraction_directives: Isolate trailing landing elements, final block headers, conversion targets, and lower-margin global navigation elements.

captured_parameters.closing_invitation: The final headline text invitation placed directly above the terminal layout boundary.
captured_parameters.target_conversion_label: The specific action text applied to the final conversion node (e.g., 'Initiate Project').

baseline_essentials.direct_contact_strings: Primary transactional email and phone reference strings.
baseline_essentials.privacy_policy_url: Direct link string to baseline compliance data.

curation_gates_and_constraints.form_suppression_rule: High-end cinematic layouts do not compromise visual momentum with crowded input forms. If a flat site exposes multi-field input forms, completely suppress them. Condense the conversion path to a singular transactional button node.
